title: Command Poster Mounting Adhesive Strips, White - 12 Adhesive Strips - Ideal for Hanging Posters, Schedules, Calendars or Pictures without Frames - Damage Free Hanging
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: DAMAGE-FREE DECORATING: Say goodbye to holes and sticky residue on your walls; Command Poster Strips are the alternative to double sided tape, drawing pins and tack; They are easy to use and help you decorate your walls without leaving any marks; Decorate, organise and celebrate damage free with Command

NO TOOLS REQUIRED: Command Poster Strips are self adhesive and easy to apply; Hang your favourite photographs, posters, kid’s artwork, banners, and signs without the hassle of tools and nails; for children’s bedrooms or student accommodation to hang posters, schedules, calendars or pictures without frames

EASY CLEAN REMOVAL: Command Poster Strips, a damage-free hanging solution can be removed without leaving any residue; Lightly hold the top of the removable adhesive strip and slowly pull straight down towards the floor to remove decor and prevent damage of walls and surfaces
RECOMMENDED SURFACES: Command strips hold strongly on a variety of indoor surfaces including painted walls, finished wood, painted concrete cinder blocks, laminate, glass, metal and tiles

PACKAGING: Packaging for this item is made with FSC Mix certified fibre with minimum of 90% recycled content; All glues and varnishes used to produce the packaging are solvent-free; The packaging is 100% recyclable in existing household waste streams
Warnings: Do not hang over beds; Do not use on wallpapers, delicate or weak surfaces; Do not hang valuable items; Failure to follow instructions may result in damage or injury

Indoor use only; Recommended for use on painted walls, finished wood, painted concrete cinder blocks, laminate, glass, metal and tiles; for children’s bedrooms or student accommodation to hang posters, schedules, calendars or pictures without frames
